info.title: Azure Monitor Pipelines Control Plane API
info.description: Provides operations for working with Azure Monitor Pipelines

get.description: List the operations for the provider
Lists all workspaces in the specified subscription
Lists all workspaces in the specified resource group
Returns the specific pipeline group instance.

parameters.name: pipelineGroupName
parameters.description: The name of pipeline group. The name is case insensitive.

put.description: Create or update a pipeline group instance.

parameters.name: pipelineGroupName
parameters.description: The name of pipeline group. The name is case insensitive.

Azure-AsyncOperation.description: A link to the status monitor

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

parameters.name: pipelineGroupName
parameters.description: The name of pipeline group. The name is case insensitive.

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: The resource properties to be updated.

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

AllowedFormats.description: Supported literals for allowed syslog and CEF parsing formats.

values.name: all
values.description: Allow all supported syslog and CEF formats.

values.name: syslogRfc3164
values.description: Allow RFC3164 syslog messages.

values.name: syslogRfc5424
values.description: Allow RFC5424 syslog messages.

values.name: cefRfc3164
values.description: Allow CEF payloads embedded in RFC3164 syslog messages.

values.name: cefRfc5424
values.description: Allow CEF payloads embedded in RFC5424 syslog messages.

values.name: rawCef
values.description: Allow raw CEF payloads without syslog encapsulation.

name.description: The name of the extended location.

type.description: The type of the extended location.

values.description: Azure Edge Zones location type

values.description: Azure Custom Locations type

AzureMonitorWorkspaceLogsApiConfig.description: Azure Monitor Workspace Logs Api configurations.

stream.description: Stream name in destination. Azure Monitor stream is related to the destination table.

schema.description: The schema mapping for incoming data.

AzureMonitorWorkspaceLogsExporter.description: Azure Monitor Workspace Logs specific configurations.

api.description: API configurations for Azure Monitor workspace exporter.

CapabilityOperator.description: The match operator for placement constraints.

values.name: In
values.description: The capability value must be one of the specified values.

values.name: NotIn
values.description: The capability value must not be one of the specified values.

values.name: Exists
values.description: The capability key must exist (value is ignored).

values.name: DoesNotExist
values.description: The capability key must not exist.

values.name: KubernetesSecret
values.description: Certificate stored in a Kubernetes secret.

values.name: KubernetesConfigMap
values.description: Certificate stored in a Kubernetes configmap.

CertificateWithKey.description: TLS certificate and private key pair.

certificate.description: Source configuration for the TLS certificate.

privateKey.description: Source configuration for the private key. Private keys must be stored in Kubernetes secrets for security reasons.

DistributionPolicy.description: Distribution policy for spreading instances across compute units.

maxInstancesPerHost.description: Maximum number of instances allowed per compute unit (node/VM). If not specified, default scheduling applies.

ExecutionPlacement.description: Constraints for guiding the execution environment of the pipeline group.

constraints.description: A list of placement constraints to guide where pipelineGroup instances should run.

distribution.description: Distribution policy for spreading instances across compute units (nodes/VMs).

azureMonitorWorkspaceLogs.description: Azure Monitor Workspace Logs specific configurations.

values.name: AzureMonitorWorkspaceLogs
values.description: Export logs to Azure Monitor Workspace.

persistentVolumeName.description: The name of the mounted persistent volume.

value.description: The PipelineGroup items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

values.name: Logs
values.description: Pipeline for logs telemetry.

PlacementConstraint.description: A placement constraint defines requirements for where pipeline group instances can be scheduled.

capability.description: The capability or attribute key used to match compute unit properties.

operator.description: The match operator, e.g., In, NotIn, Exists, DoesNotExist.

values.description: The values to match against. Not required for Exists/DoesNotExist.

PrivateKeySource.description: Configuration for private key source location.

type.description: The type of private key source. Only kubernetesSecret is supported for security reasons.

location.description: Location of the private key source.

subLocation.description: Sub-location within the private key source.

PrivateKeySourceType.description: The type of private key source.

values.name: KubernetesSecret
values.description: Private key stored in a Kubernetes secret. This is the only supported type for security reasons.

values.name: Batch
values.description: Batch processor.

values.name: TransformLanguage
values.description: Transform language processor.

values.name: MicrosoftSyslog
values.description: Microsoft Syslog processor.

values.name: MicrosoftCommonSecurityLog
values.description: Microsoft CEF/Common Security Log processor.

ProvisioningState.description: The provisioning state of a resource.

values.name: Succeeded
values.description: Resource has been created.

values.name: Failed
values.description: Resource creation failed.

values.name: Canceled
values.description: Resource creation was canceled.

values.name: Creating
values.description: The resource is being created.

values.name: Deleting
values.description: The resource is being deleted.

tlsConfiguration.description: Reference to a named TLS configuration. If not specified, default TLS configuration is used.

syslog.description: Syslog configurations. This field is mandatory for syslog type receivers.

otlp.description: OTLP receiver configurations. This field is mandatory for OTLP receivers.

values.name: Syslog
values.description: Linux syslog.

values.name: OTLP
values.description: Receives data from a OTLP collector.

RecordMap.description: Record map for schema in azure monitor.

ResourceMap.description: Resource map for schema in azure monitor.

SchemaMap.description: Schema map for azure monitor for logs.

resourceMap.description: Resource Map captures information about the entity for which telemetry is recorded. For example, metrics exposed by a Kubernetes container can be linked to a resource that specifies the cluster, namespace, pod, and container name.Resource may capture an entire hierarchy of entity identification. It may describe the host in the cloud and specific container or an application running in the process.

scopeMap.description: A scope map is a logical unit of the application code with which the emitted telemetry can be associated.

ScopeMap.description: Scope map for schema in azure monitor.

pipelines.description: Pipelines belonging to a given pipeline group.

persistence.description: Persistence options to all pipelines in the instance.

pipelines.description: Pipelines belonging to a given pipeline group.

persistence.description: Persistence options to all pipelines in the instance.

SyslogReceiver.description: Base receiver using TCP as transport protocol.

allowedFormats.description: List of allowed message formats for syslog/CEF ingestion. Default 'all'.

values.name: tcp
values.description: tcp protocol.

values.name: udp
values.description: udp protocol.

allowSkipPriHeader.description: Configure the receiver to allow parsing of messages without the PRI header. Default false.

TlsConfiguration.description: TLS configuration that can be referenced by receivers.

name.description: The name of the TLS configuration.

mode.description: The TLS security mode for receivers using this configuration. Default is 'mutualTls'.

values.name: Disabled
values.description: No TLS encryption - plain text communication.

values.name: ServerOnly
values.description: Server-side TLS only - encrypts communication but doesn't validate client certificates.

values.name: MutualTls
values.description: Mutual TLS - encrypts communication and validates both server and client certificates.

tlsCertificate.description: TLS certificate and its private key. If not specified, default TLS certificate is used.

clientCa.description: Certificate source configuration for the client CA certificate for validating client certificates. If not specified, default CA certificates are used.

transformStatement.description: Transform statement to execute over the data passing through the processor.
